parameters.query: SELECT ac.code, ac.nom, ac.setup_price, ac.monthly_price, ac.workflow_templates, t.name AS tenant_name FROM automation_catalog ac, tenants t WHERE ac.id = '{{ $('02. Valider donnees').first().json.automationId }}'::uuid AND t.id = '{{ $('02. Valider donnees').first().json.tenantId }}'::uuid

SELECT id, n8n_folder_id, n8n_folder_name, n8n_workflow_ids, status FROM automation_purchases WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('02. Valider donnees').first().json.tenantId }}'::uuid AND automation_id = '{{ $('02. Valider donnees').first().json.automationId }}'::uuid LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO automation_purchases (tenant_id, automation_id, status, n8n_folder_id, n8n_folder_name, n8n_workflow_ids, setup_price_paid, monthly_price, config, activated_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.automationId }}'::uuid, 'active', {{ $json.folderId ? "'" + $json.folderId + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.folderName }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.allWorkflowIds) }}'::jsonb, {{ $json.setupPrice }}, {{ $json.monthlyPrice }}, '{{ JSON.stringify($json.config || {}) }}'::jsonb, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, automation_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'active', n8n_folder_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.n8n_folder_id, automation_purchases.n8n_folder_id), n8n_folder_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.n8n_folder_name, automation_purchases.n8n_folder_name), n8n_workflow_ids = EXCLUDED.n8n_workflow_ids, config = EXCLUDED.config, activated_at = NOW(), suspended_at = NULL, cancelled_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id, status

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('12. Fusionner resultat').first().json;
const purchaseResult = $input.first().json;

return [{ json: {
  success: !!data.workflowId,
  workflowId: data.workflowId,
  workflowName: data.workflowName,
  folderId: data.folderId,
  folderName: data.folderName,
  tenantId: data.tenantId,
  automationCode: data.automationCode,
  movedToFolder: data.movedToFolder || false,
  workflowIds: data.allWorkflowIds || [],
  purchaseId: purchaseResult.id || null,
  purchaseStatus: purchaseResult.status || 'active',
  message: data.workflowId
    ? `Workflow "${data.workflowName}" cree avec succes${data.movedToFolder ? ` et deplace dans "${data.folderName}"` : ''}. Achat enregistre.`
    : 'Erreur lors de la creation du workflow'
} }];
